rulings.Case Title: BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY VS. BURT HAMROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Borel Private Bank & Trust Company'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 27, 2011, line 16, Plaintiff Borel Private Bank & Trust Company's Motion For Summary Judgment. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED IN PART. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO ISSUES 1 AND 3 WHERE PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY SHOW AMOUNT OF DEFAULT. COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO GREENE DECLARATION. MOTION DENIED AS TO ISSUE 2 BECAUSE IT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 437c(f)(1). DENIED AS TO ISSUE 11. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO A $4.5 MILLION SET OFF/CREDIT RATHER THAN $4.3 MILLION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO REMAINING AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES WHICH FAIL. ISSUE 4 (LACHES) IS NOT A COGNIZABLE DEFENSE TO A BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM AS A MATTER OF LAW. SEE ABBOTT V. CITY OF L.A. (1958) 50 CAL.2D AT 461-462. GRANTED AS TO ISSUE #5 (UNCLEAN HANDS), #6 (ESTOPPEL), #7 (WAIVER), #8 (PLAINTIFF'S BREACH), #9 (DEFENDANT EXCUSED), #10 (DAMAGE SELF-INFLICTED), #12 (EXCUSED FROM COMPLIANCE), #13 (FAILURE TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION), #14 (STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS), #15 (PLAINTIFF'S POSITION IMPROPER), AND #16 (FRAUD/BAD FAITH). DEFENDANTS INTERROGATORY RESPONSES ARE FACTUALLY DEVOID AND EVASIVE. THE LOAN DOCUMENT FACIALLY SHOWED AND HAMROL KNEW THAT THE CONTRACTS LACKED THE ACCOUNT RESERVES WHEN HE SIGNED THEM. =(302/CWW)
